crisis: Displacement from Nicaragua to Costa Rica

tavily.answer: In 2025, the number of internal displacements caused by conflict or violence reached a record high, surpassing those caused by natural disasters for the first time, according to the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre. The situation in Nicaragua has led to an increase in displacements towards Costa Rica, with individuals fleeing due to political and social unrest. The humanitarian impact on civilians from Colombia's armed conflict also reached its worst level in a decade in 2025, according to the International Red Cross Committee. The international community has responded to the Venezuelan earthquakes by sending rescue equipment and aid, although the delivery of aid is being impeded by serious damage to infrastructure.
